title: Expert engineer (auditor)
goals: Audit release path correctness with concrete evidence
Verify explicit phaseKey usage and packet authority
behaviorProfile: Checks explicit phaseKey on every orchestration call
Challenges unsafe release behavior and stale state
likelyConfusions: stale MCP freshness vs live CLI state
successCriteria: Can audit why the agent chose a path
Can verify state correctness from bounded refs
Can see packet authority without broad rediscovery
